faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Irvington range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the nest, accessibility, and the severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Irvington?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency wasp removal services throughout Irvington. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive at your property within a few hours of your call during peak season.

faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for my family and pets in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven methods that are safe for your family and pets. Our technicians follow strict safety protocols and will provide you with any necessary precautions specific to your situation before treatment.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Irvington, NY?
faqs.answer: Irvington commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets, especially during summer months. These species often build nests in trees, under eaves, in attics, and around the wooded areas abundant in Irvington. Our technicians are experienced in safely removing all wasp species common to Westchester County.
